message:
feat(tests): CLI extension-policy flag tests + scoped policy enforcement suite

CLI tests (src/cli.rs):
- extension_policy_flag_parses: validates --extension-policy safe
- extension_policy_flag_permissive: validates --extension-policy permissive
- extension_policy_flag_absent: validates default None when flag omitted

New test file (tests/capability_policy_scoped.rs):
- Config-based policy resolution via resolve_extension_policy()
- allow_dangerous toggle correctly removes exec/env from deny list
- Config merge logic for ExtensionPolicyConfig layering
- Per-extension scoped enforcement through evaluate_for()
- Prompt cache semantics (key independence, revocation clearing)
- required_capability_for_host_call() tool→capability mapping
- FsOp parsing and capability mapping for all filesystem variants
- Dispatch edge cases: validation errors and error codes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
